mapper.sql: id, policy_code, version, title, summary, content, rules_json, status, is_adverse, effective_at, published_at, notice_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund_policy WHERE policy_code = #{policyCode} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND effective_at IS NOT NULL AND effective_at <= #{asOf} ORDER BY effective_at DESC, version DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM refund_policy WHERE policy_code = #{policyCode} AND status = 'DRAFT' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_policy (policy_code, version, title, summary, content, rules_json, status, is_adverse, effective_at, created_by) VALUES (#{policyCode}, #{version}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{rulesJson}, #{status}, #{adverse}, #{effectiveAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE refund_policy SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, rules_json = #{rulesJson}, is_adverse = #{adverse}, effective_at = #{effectiveAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE refund_policy SET status = 'PUBLISHED', notice_id = #{noticeId}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO refund_policy_acknowledgement (user_id, refund_policy_id, trigger_type, action_key, acknowledged_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{policyId}, #{triggerType}, #{actionKey}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
